name: Cowboy Steak'n Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans ready to serve beef broth (14.5 oz each)
16 oz Thick & Chunky Salsa or Picante
1 can Great Northern beans, drained and rinsed
Fresh basil, cilantro, or parsley – for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips that are 1/4 inch thick, then cut each strip into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the beef, dried basil, salt, pepper, crushed garlic, and oil. Toss to coat evenly.
3. Heat a Dutch oven or large saucepan over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add the beef mixture to the pan; cook and stir for 4-5 minutes or until browned.
5. Stir in the broth, salsa, and vegetables. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the beans and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
8. Stir in the spinach. Garnish each serving of soup with fresh basil, parsley, or cilantro.
